title: [Trading Post, Common Room]
description: Travelers and adventurers of all races and ages find rest in this large, open room.  A fire pit is located in the center of the room, providing warmth and light.  Barmaids serve food and drink from behind a long oak bar.

wayto.25592: ;e table = "Cat"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
